name: Energy World Corporation Ltd
analysis: EWC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.0600, stop A$0.0544, target A$0.0860 (4.68:1) — then trail it.
